/usr/bin/ar qc out/libcpg.a CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/src/cpg_workspace.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/src/cpg_solve.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/algebra_libs.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/auxil.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/csc_math.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/csc_utils.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/error.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/kkt.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/matrix.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/osqp_api.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/qdldl.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/qdldl_interface.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/scaling.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/util.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/src/vector.c.o CMakeFiles/cpg.dir/solver_code/workspace.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib out/libcpg.a
